raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a follow-up complaint regarding a prior case ( CFPB XXXX # XXXX ) that was closed without resolution. 

Citibank claims that I received two credits related to a {$1800.00} payment : A refund check for {$1700.00}, which I acknowledge and deposited A second credit of {$1800.00} via a chargeback on XXXX which I did NOT receive Citibank has stated that my bank should have credited my account but has failed to provide any verifiable transaction details, including : ACH trace number Chargeback reference number Proof of settlement into my account Receiving bank confirmation I have confirmed that no such funds were received in my bank account. 

Without traceable transaction data, Citibank has not demonstrated that the alleged second credit was ever completed. 

I am requesting : Verifiable transaction details for the alleged {$1800.00} chargeback Proof of settlement into my account Correction of my account if such proof can not be provided Citibanks claim that I received duplicate credit is unsupported and remains unresolved.
